name: GUEST
detail: A one-time guest visit with access to selected events to accurately assess the value of the ecosystem.

name: START
detail: Foundation: education, group consulting, networking, community manager.

name: BUSINESS
detail: Scaling: personal consulting, Board of Directors, business visits + full START package.

name: PREMIER
detail: Influence: 2 consultations/mo, strategy session, private dinners, Union Council membership + START + BUSINESS.

name: FOUNDER
detail: 52 tracking meetings per year, 2-day strategy session, closed sessions with UNION founders twice a year.
